programmes.show_description: Based in County Durham Crafter's Companion strives to create products to make crafting easier, more enjoyable, and beautifully rewarding. Tune in to find out what's new!

Nicola Walton is in the Sewing Street studio for the first time, bringing her beautiful brand Daisy & Grace to us. Stay tuned for EPP Quilt as you go's, templates & bag kits!
Kerry Lord is back with her beautiful Crochet Fairytales Book with the addition of two new story kits not available in the book: The Hare's Bride and The Golden Goose.
Dive into the bold and playful world of Tula Pink, with eye-catching fabrics full of colour and character. Perfect for adding a modern twist to your quilting and sewing projects.
Kerry Lord is back for her second hour of TOFT with Thumbelina's world of flowers and various garden creatures. Every order this hour will receive a free plant pot stitch marker.

programmes.show_name: Miss It Miss Out Quilt Kits
programmes.show_description: Don't miss your chance to grab these beautiful quilt kits while stocks last. With coordinated fabrics and ready-to-sew designs that take the guesswork out of colour matching.
